objective: Record the supplied Local CI Gate runbook and reviewer-response memo as governance planning artifacts, with a PDCA/R companion and issue-backed OVERLORD_BACKLOG row, before any implementation work begins.
scope_boundary: Add the supplied runbook under docs/plans without changing its content.
Add the supplied reviewer-response memo under docs/plans without changing its content.
Add an issue-specific PDCA/R companion under docs/plans.
Mirror the planning intake in OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md with an open GitHub issue reference.
Keep all changes on the planning surface; do not modify implementation scripts, workflows, hooks, package files, or product-repo code.
out_of_scope: Implementing the Local CI Gate runbook.
Changing lefthook, Playwright, package scripts, workflows, hooks, or CI behavior.
Editing the supplied runbook or reviewer-response memo beyond storing them as planning artifacts.
Closing issue #253 before Stage 6 closeout evidence exists.
research_summary: The supplied runbook and reviewer-response memo were reviewed in discussion before intake. The memo was accepted for planning use. The runbook is suitable as a planning artifact, with five pre-implementation corrections recorded in the PDCA/R Adjust section: replace xargs handling for FULL_SUITE, align full-suite override language, define --explain-trigger semantics, specify @covers * behavior, and clarify the target product repo issue/backlog owner.

sprints.name: Planning Artifact Intake
sprints.goal: Store the Local CI Gate planning package in governance with issue-backed tracking and no implementation changes.
tasks: Create the governing GitHub issue before adding the backlog row.
Import the runbook and reviewer-response memo under docs/plans.
Create the PDCA/R companion for issue #253.
Add the issue-backed OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md Planned row.
Run backlog alignment and diff hygiene validation.
acceptance_criteria: GitHub issue #253 is open and referenced by OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md.
The runbook and memo exist under docs/plans and match the supplied zip content by SHA-256.
The PDCA/R companion records planning-only scope and pre-implementation corrections.
Changed paths are limited to docs/plans planning artifacts and OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md.
Backlog GitHub alignment and diff hygiene checks pass.

specialist_reviews.focus: Assess whether the supplied runbook and reviewer-response memo are suitable for governance planning intake without implementation changes.
specialist_reviews.summary: The reviewer-response memo is ready for planning use. The runbook is appropriate as a planning artifact after recording technical corrections that must be resolved before implementation.

alternate_model_review.summary: This slice stores planning artifacts and updates issue-backed backlog tracking only. It does not change standards, architecture, CI enforcement, hooks, scripts, or cross-repo contracts.
evidence: Changed paths are limited to docs/plans and OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md.
Implementation of the Local CI Gate remains deferred to a later target-repo issue-backed slice.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Planning-only artifact intake for issue #253: docs/plans runbook, memo, PDCA/R, structured plan, and issue-backed OVERLORD_BACKLOG row.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Open a planning-only PR for review. Do not begin Local CI Gate implementation until a target-repo issue and handoff exist.

material_deviation_rules: If implementation files become part of the diff, remove them from this branch and create a separate issue-backed implementation slice.
If the supplied runbook needs corrections before merge, record them in the PDCA/R or a follow-up issue unless the operator explicitly approves editing the imported artifact.
If governance CI requires additional planning evidence, add it only under docs/plans or another planning-approved surface.
If issue #253 is closed or superseded before merge, update OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md before publishing.
Do not alter the dirty shared main checkout while this isolated worktree remains the active workspace.
approved_by: operator instruction: add these files to repo for planning purposes, pdcar this and follow repo workflow rules exactly
operator instruction: in an isolated clean branch, let's begin this
operator instruction: loop through, no hitl
